supersedes.reason: Slot count + Item type enum widened (10 → 13 slots) — requires fresh publish per Sui semantics (no upgrade for struct/enum changes).

slots._comment: 13-slot loadout. v5.0 / v5.1-pre-13 had 10. The 3 new slots are pants (legs lower armor), bracelets (forearm accessory), pauldrons (shoulder armor).

v5.1_13slot_changes_vs_v5.1_10slot: Item.item_type enum widened: PANTS=10, BRACELETS=11, PAULDRONS=12 added (mint_item_admin shape validation requires slot_type=mainhand for non-weapon non-shield types)

equipment.move: equip_pants / unequip_pants, equip_bracelets / unequip_bracelets, equip_pauldrons / unequip_pauldrons primitives added — same shape as helmet/chest/gloves/boots/belt (owner + fight-lock + type + level-req + slot-empty checks)
DOF slot keys added: 'pants', 'bracelets', 'pauldrons' — all string-keyed on Character.id alongside existing 10
Server combat math updated: getEquipmentBonuses iterates over 13 slots when aggregating bonuses
Frontend EQUIPMENT_SLOT_KEYS extended from 10 to 13; PTB save_loadout PTB-builder picks them up automatically via the existing iteration
Move test count: 64 → 71 (added 7 tests: 3 happy-path equip/unequip, 4 abort-path)
v5_2_deferred: Confirm-modal gate for every signAndExecuteTransaction (MAINNET_PREP §D HARD blocker)
WS message Zod validation + rate-limiter middleware
Frontend Draw modal + W/L/D counter render
Empty catch sweep + StatBonuses shape unification

stat_profiles_for_new_slots._comment: Recommended stat profiles for catalog mints. Each within the user's rarity stat-budget (Common=20, Uncommon=40, Rare=70, Epic=110, Legendary=160).
stat_profiles_for_new_slots.pants: Legs lower armor — primary: armor + endurance. Secondary: small HP. Profile mirrors boots.
stat_profiles_for_new_slots.bracelets: Forearm accessory — primary: dexterity + crit_chance_bonus. Secondary: small attack_bonus. Lighter than armor slots; light arms enable swift strikes.
stat_profiles_for_new_slots.pauldrons: Shoulder/upper armor — primary: armor + strength. Secondary: small HP. Heavier than helmet, shielding the upper body.
